alibaba-group.summary: CNY 18.23B (~$2.75B) SAMR fine (Apr 2021) — the largest antitrust penalty in Chinese history — for forcing merchants to choose between Tmall and rival platforms ('er xuan yi' exclusivity).

meituan-dianping.summary: CNY 3.44B (~$534M) SAMR fine (Oct 2021) on Meituan for similar 'pick one of two' exclusivity practices with restaurant partners.

didi-global.summary: CNY 8.026B (~$1.2B) joint SAMR + CAC fine (Jul 2022) on Didi for cybersecurity, data security, and personal-information protection violations following NYSE-IPO probe.

tencent-music-entertainment.summary: SAMR ordered Tencent to give up exclusive music-licensing rights (Jul 2021) — small administrative fine but major remedy.
